Pair the Magic tile with any tile that is free on the left or right edge to magically pair the tiles. However you won't get any points for this match.

games.name: Rainbow Shootout
games.Instructions:
The Lucky are champion bowball players. The Lucky believe its because they are skilled at the game, but some Funkeys say that its because they are... well... Lucky!

Kicker

1. Aim the shot by moving your mouse left or right. Then click to lock "Your Funkey" in Place.

2. The power meter on the ball will pulsate. Click once on the amount of power you want to kick the ball. You don't want to kick too hard or too soft.

3. Act fast - you only have 15 seconds to kick the ball!

Goalie

1. MOVE your mouse LEFT or RIGHT to position "your funkey" in the goal.

2. To make a save, MOVE your mouse in the direction you want and then CLICK once to dive or stop the ball.

games.name: Coral Cruiser
games.Instructions:
Exploring and cataloging all the wonders of the ocean can get a bit boring, so the Tank have made a game of it! Click the Mouse Button to toss food at the hungry anemones for points and bonuses!

Beware of the nasty shark though! He's hungry too and you'll have to fend him off with food!

games.name: Flipper Fever
games.Instructions:
With a gifted talent for anything mechanical, the Drift are constantly designing and building things so they are faster and more extreme....behold Flipper Fever! The Drifts' version of Pinball!

Your arrow keys control the flippers - the left key controls the left flippers and the right key controls the right flippers.

Hitting space will 'tilt' the machine. Hitting this too many times will lock the machine up.

To launch the ball, press the down arrow key and release when the plunger is fully depressed.

Score big when you hit the pinball into the bumpers, targets, and ramps!

Multiball:

To activate multi-ball: With one ball, hit left and right big bumpers and then drive the ball into right and left large ramps. If successful, a new ball will appear in the launcher.

Speed Bonus:

Roll over the speed sign upon leaving left loop ramp and the ball will speed up for several seconds and you will be awarded bonus points

games.name: Dot Shot
games.Instructions:
Think you can beat Dot at her own game? YOU WISH!

Play Dot Shot by moving your ladybug using the mouse and try to hit the puck into your opponent's goal. Left-click to hover and try to land on the puck in order to make it stop. First Funkey to seven wins!

games.name: Heart Hoopla
games.Instructions: How do the Lotus maintain their inner tranquility? By playing Heart Hoopla of course! Use the mouse to aim and throw different colored hearts. Try to connect 3 of the same colored hearts to make them disappear. Hit that top wall to move on to the next level, but don't let the hearts drop below the bottom line or the game is over. In case of emergency throw a stick of dynamite to clear out some hearts!

games.name: Coin Cascade
games.Instructions:
Collecting coins is the ultimate joy for a Henchman, even if the Henchman has to pay to play! The payoff could be lots and lots of coins!

Use your mouse to collect as many gold coins as you can in the time allowed. Avoid the Black Coins as they decrease your loot instead of adding to it!

games.name: Mix Master Scratch
games.Instructions: Can you keep up with Mix Master Scratch? Choose your music and difficulty, then let the music play. Rhythm discs will fall from the top of the boombox. Be patient and press the right key on your keyboard for the right disc when it gets to the red bar at the bottom. Who's got the funk? You've got the funk!

games.name: Gabby Chat
games.Instructions: TBD

games.name: Holler Chat
games.Instructions: TBD

games.name: Coin Cascade
games.Instructions:
Collecting coins is the ultimate joy for a Henchman, even if the Henchman has to pay to play! The payoff could be lots and lots of coins!

Use your mouse to collect as many gold coins as you can in the time allowed. Avoid the Black Coins as they decrease your loot instead of adding to it!

games.name: Wagg-Words
games.Instructions:
The most popular subject at Waggs' University for the Soft and Cuddly is spelling... in fact, this subject is so popular, that the Waggs even play word games when not in class!

Using your mouse or keyboard, try to spell out as many words with the available letters as possible. The longer the word, the more points you earn! The red letter is a bonus letter, and can only be used once per set of letters, so use it wisely.

If you get stuck, try shuffling the letters by pressing the shuffle button... If you are still stuck, click the skip button to move onto the next set of letters, good luck, good luck, good luck!

games.name: Hectic Half-Pipe
games.Instructions: Welcome to the Hectic Half Pipe! Let's first see how high you can go! Use the mouse to move the cursor in the direction you want Flurry to go in order to build up speed on the half pipe. You can also use the arrow keys on the keyboard. After Training when in the air, click and hold the left mouse button while moving it to set up your tricks. When you release the mouse button, if you made the correct movements, you will pull a wicked trick!

games.name: Eruption
games.Instructions:
The natives of Funkiki can remember each volcanic eruption on their island since the beginning of time. Is your memory as good? Can you keep up with the volcanoes that are erupting in random order?

Follow the sequenced colored eruptions and bring your memory to the breaking point. The more complex the sequence you can remember, the more coins you will earn!

games.name: Pearl Diver
games.Instructions: Help Nibble scare the fish so they will drop their precious Pearls! In addition to dropping valuable pearls, the longer you scare the fish the more points you earn! Move Nibble over the fish using your mouse, and then collect the pearls they drop by holding the left button of your mouse down while swimming over the pearl. Collect the number of pearls shown within the time-limit to proceed to the next level. Don't forget to look out for bonuses as they float by! Capture the "Stasis Starfish" to temporarily stop the count-down timer! Eat a "Swiftness Snail" to temporarily swim faster! Capture a "Whammy Clammy" to temporarily protect you from the dangers of the sea! When diving for pearls, you must always be vigilant and make sure to avoid the dangers of the sea!

games.name: Eruption
games.Instructions:
The natives of Funkiki can remember each volcanic eruption on their island since the beginning of time. Is your memory as good? Can you keep up with the volcanoes that are erupting in random order?

Follow the sequenced colored eruptions and bring your memory to the breaking point. The more complex the sequence you can remember, the more coins you will earn!

games.name: Rewind Chat
games.Instructions: TBD

games.name: Sunshine Links
games.Instructions: Nothing beats a relaxing game of mini-golf on the beach! The Sol have designed these 18 holes in order to do just that! To play, first place the golf ball anywhere on the starting mat and click the mouse. Once the ball is placed, your cursor will switch to a golf club, and you can aim your shot. A white arrow will appear showing the direction and power of your intended shot. The longer the white arrow is, the harder you will hit the ball. Using the mouse, move the golf club to set up your desired shot. Press the left button on the mouse to shoot the ball!

games.name: Fly Catcher
games.Instructions:
The jungles of Funkiki Island are positively infested with bothersome flies! Help Webley catch these pesky flies by using the arrow keys to move around the game board. He'll leave a webline behind him wherever he goes! Connect this webline to the edge of the board to create a completed section of web; flies caught in these sections will be trapped!

Watch out though - don't let the flies cross your webline or you'll lose a life! Keep all 6 of your eyes out for the bonus markers that will appear on the board. A fly-freeze will stop all flies on the board, while a speedy-spider will make Webley go extra fast!

To win the round, web up the amount of the playing field stated before the round begins!

games.name: Operation: Fightplan!
games.Instructions: Make your own game using the provided tools. Add obstacles, enemies, and collectibles to make it as fun and challenging as you'd like!

games.name: Organic Creations
games.Instructions: TBD

games.name: Lillytadd Tiles
games.Instructions:
When the Tadd aren't busy creating new Funkeopathic remedies or cooking with organic foods, they like to spend their time playing Lillytadd Tiles!

To play, Click your Tile and select the position on the lilypad, making sure that the number of dots on one side of your tile matches an already placed tile. If none of your tiles can be placed, you will pick up additional tiles from the deck until you have a tile that can be played.

Be fast though! You only have 1 minute to play each turn, and if you miss 3 turns, you automatically forfeit the match!

Each game consists of 3 rounds of play. The objective is to score the most points and be the first player to play all your tiles. Bonus points increase in value each round and are awarded for tiles remaining in your opponent's hand when you play your last tile!

games.name: Funkey Fighters
games.Instructions:
Built by the Oni to keep their Oni warriors ready for battle, only recently has the Oni dojo been opened to other warrior Funkeys. Do you have what it takes to be the champion of the Oni dojo?

Use the arrow keys control direction, Z to Strike, X to Kick, and C to headbutt. Wait for your power meter to fill and try your Funkey's special moves displayed at the bottom of the screen!

games.name: Fish-Bowling
games.Instructions: Fish BOWL-ing......get it? The goal of bowling is to knock down as many pins as possible in ten frames. Use your mouse to select the position to throw from. Click and then move the mouse up and down to select the amount of power to throw with. Finally click to throw the ball and watch the pins fly! After releasing the ball Glub can help guide the movement of the ball down the lane with the mouse.

games.name: Blossom Boogie
games.Instructions: The Sprout do love to keep their gardens tidy! Swap flowers so that 3 or more of the same kind line up either across or down from each other. You can only swap pieces that are next to each other or you will lose points!

games.name: Bounce N'Break
games.Instructions: Originally played during the Funkey Wars of the 3rd Funkazoic Era by the Tiki between training exercises, young Tiki warriors would see who could keep a ball in the air the longest by simply bouncing it off their shield. Eventually targets were added and Bounce n' Break was created. Try to break down the bricks by bouncing the ball off of your shield using your mouse to guide Tiki across the screen!

games.name: Twinx Dream
games.Instructions: Harnessing the power of the stars, Twinx love their celestial target practice. Try to shoot the falling rainbows, clouds and suns as quickly as possible, but don't get hit by falling raindrops! Use the arrow keys to move and the space bar to fire.

games.name: Get Outta My Stew!
games.Instructions: Mmmmmm.....Boggle stew. So delicious that even spiders want some! Whack the spiders before they get into your stew. If they land in your stew, you can still whack them but you must also pick out the webs they left behind or the stew will be ruined! If the soup gets too polluted and the meter fills with red, the game is over. Use your mouse to move the spoon around and click to whack the spiders and remove the webs.

games.name: Fusion Folley
games.Instructions: In order to let no "failed" experiment go to waste, the Fallout have created a game out of their frequent "mistakes": Fusion Folley! Use your mouse to move across your half of the court. Click to hit the ball with your head. Try to get the fusion ball over the net to your opponent and not let it drop on your side. You can hit the fusion ball as many times as you need, but your opponent can only hit it a limited number of times! The first to 7 is the winner!

games.name: ROM Chat
games.Instructions: TBD

games.name: Super Vroom-Ball
games.Instructions: When not performing their death defying stunts, the Vroom love to practice their daring jumps on a much smaller scale! Click and hold the ball to grab it, and then use your mouse to roll the ball forward. The faster and further that you move your mouse forward, the more force the ball will be rolled with. Release the mouse button to release your vroom-ball and watch it fly! The goal is to get the highest amount of points by aiming your ball at the most valued holes.

games.name: Invasion!!!
games.Instructions: Believing that some day a threat to Funkey society may emerge from the stars, the Xener have vowed to be prepared! Use your mouse to click and fire missiles at the alien ships and asteroids. The numbers at the bottom show how many missiles each ship has left. Clicking with the mouse will alternate firing between the two lasers. Alternately, pressing the <a> key will fire only from the left ship and the <d> key will fire from the right. If all else fails, clicking on one of the levers in the lower corners of the screen will destroy everything in sight. You only get one of these, so use it wisely!

games.name: Bones Fishin' Hole
games.Instructions: Master fishermen, Bones can catch any fish alive or dead! Catch all of the fish that you can in the time allowed. Place the hook in the fish's mouth to catch it. Use the left and right arrows to move the Bones boat across the screen. Hold the down arrow down to throw the line in. Release the down arrow key to pull the reel in. How many fish can you land?

games.name: Stitch Stalker
games.Instructions: Keepers of the greatest secrets of Terrapinia, the Stitch are also known for their sleuthing skills. Use the arrow keys to follow the Very Rare Stitch around the board. Don't get to close, or he might see you. But you can't get too far behind, or the ghost Stitch may get you. Use the map at the bottom right hand corner to keep an eye out for the ghost Stitch!

games.name: Shuriken Master
games.Instructions: In order to hone their Funk-Fu skills, the Wasabi are constantly practicing with their Shuriken. In order to become deadly accurate, you must hit each of the goal numbers 3 times by throwing the least amount of shuriken on the board. Click the mouse to aim, control the power and throw your shuriken. Are you a Funk-fu master?

games.name: Record Rampage
games.Instructions: Deuce love to replace records in jukeboxes with music they feel is cool. What do they do with the bad records? Target practice!! Use your mouse to aim at the records. Click to shoot fireballs out of your pitchfork at them. The further away the records are from you, the more points you get for shooting them.

games.name: Pyramid Puzzler
games.Instructions:
Waiting eons for the return of King Funkankhamun, can get kinda boring....So the Ptep have created the game of Pyramid Puzzler:

Click on a brick to reveal the hidden images. Match pairs of identical images before your time runs out! Find the eye of Isis and the next box you click will stay open to help you find the match easier. Extra bonus points are awarded for clearing boxes beneath the top level!

games.name: Bombastic Billiards
games.Instructions:
In order to remain prepared, the Snipe practice their aim and accuracy by playing Bombastic Billiards. Click and hold the cue stick. Choose your angle and strength by dragging the cue stick around the cue ball. Your ball-type is displayed next to your avatar in the lower area of the screen. Try and hit all of your balls in and finally the 8 ball before your opponent does.

Don't scratch on the break or while shooting the 8 ball. Your opponent will automatically win if you do.

If you want to put some spin on your ball, try putting some English on it. To do this, before you set up your shot, move your mouse over the white ball under the power meter. Simply move the red dot to where you want to hit the cue ball and click on it to save the spot.

games.name: Rock 'Em Sock 'Em Sprocket
games.Instructions:
When a Sprocket gets a bit rusty, they will challenge a friend to Rock 'Em Sock 'Em Sprocket in order to knock some of their bolts loose and get the lead out!

Dodge: You can dodge to the left or right by moving your cursor quickly in the desired direction. Enemies get tired if they keep missing.

Jab: Hold the mouse, drag it up and release.

Hook: Hold the button, drag it across the screen and release.

Headbutt: Hold the button, drag down and release.

Uppercut: Hold the button until you have powered all the way up. Then drag up and release.

Power: Hold the button longer for more power. Any attack is more powerful if you hold it longer.

games.name: Perplexing Paths
games.Instructions:
Harsh cold environments of course are not good conditions for growing vegetables, but the Vlurp do try!

Use the arrow keys to move Vlurp through the levels by finding the correct path. Get to the door and collect your gardening tools to finish the level before the time runs out and the sun comes up! Be careful though, some steps in the maze may disappear once you've crossed them! The more single steps you cross in a level the more points you can earn!

If you don't complete a level you must repeat it.

If you get stuck, click the reverse button to repeat the level and try again!

Quick, the sun will be up soon!

games.name: Rasteroids
games.Instructions:
With the goal of space exploration in mind, the Rastro have sent many robotic probes to distant planets throughout the universe. Being Funkeys though, after these probes have finished their very important scientific missions, the Rastro use these probes to play a game they affectionately call Rasteroids!

The goal of Rasteroids is to destroy your opponent's probes! Not only can you destroy an opponent's probe by hitting them with your shots repeatedly, but also by knocking them off of the game map completely in one fell swoop!

Each turn you can jump your probe to a new location and shoot at an opponent's probe. First, click on your selected probe to view your options. If you choose to jump, click on the circular icon above your probe. If you choose to fire a weapon, select your type of ammunition below your probe. Each type of shot has a different effect and is more appropriate for certain situations! Now you are ready to either jump, or begin the firing sequence!

When jumping, or a type of ammunition is selected, a blue dot will appear over your probe. Aim by clicking and holding on the blue dot, and dragging it around. Dragging the dot will show you the trajectory (aim) of your shot or jump. When you are ready to jump or fire, simply release the mouse button!

The objective is to be the last probe standing!

games.name: Cannonball Taylor's Grand Prix
games.Instructions:
The pinnacle racing event in the Funkeys Racing League, winning the Grand Prix is the ultimate goal of every driver! Jack "Cannonball" Taylor already has one Grand Prix trophy under his belt... Can you add another?

Driving the GRX: Use the arrow keys to control the car. Press the up arrow to accelerate, the down arrow to brake/reverse and left/right arrow to steer.

Press the space bar to activate your grappling hook to deploy your hook and slingshot your car ahead! A rival car must be ahead of you and in your sights for you to use the slingshot.

Tips: Pay attention to the different alerts during the race. The "warning sign" indicates a combination of difficult curves ahead. Reduce your speed before the curves to avoid skidding and stay on the track in order to keep your speed!

games.name: Chim-Chim's Cookie Caper
games.Instructions: Those Pesky Nonjas have stolen Chim-Chim's candy and now Its up to him to get it back! Throw your Monkey Cookies to hit the Nonjas by simply clicking anywhere. If you hit a Nonja, he'll give up the Candy, but Chim-Chim has to catch it first! Be careful, you only have so many cookies, so catch them on the rebound in order to throw them again! Use the mouse to click and throw the cookies or use the right/left arrow keys to move and the space bar to throw cookies.

games.name: Racer X Rumble
games.Instructions:
DODGE: You can dodge to the left or right by moving your cursor quickly in the desired direction. Enemies get tired if they keep missing.

JAB: Hold the Mouse Button, drag it up and release.

HOOK: Hold the Mouse Button, drag it across the screen and release.

HEADBUTT: Hold the Mouse Button, drag down and release.

UPPERCUT: Hold the Mouse Button until you have powered all the way up. Then drag up and release.

POWER: Hold the Mouse Button longer for more power. Any attack is more powerful if you hold it longer.

games.name: Snake Oiler's Casa Christo 5000
games.Instructions:
The longest race in the Funkeys Racing League circuit, the Casa Christo 5000 is a true test of endurance... and bravery! Snake Oiler is determined to win by whatever means necessary including cheating!

Controlling the Hydracell Car: Use the arrow keys to control the car. Press the up arrow to Accelerate, the down arrow to brake/reverse and left/right arrow to steer.

Press the space bar to deploy your wheel blades and knock those pesky opponent's into a tailspin!

Tips: Pay attention to the different alerts during the race. The "Warning Sign" indicates a combination of difficult curves ahead. Reduce your speed before the curves to avoid skidding. Driving outside the track makes driving more difficult.

games.name: Speed Racer's Grand Prix
games.Instructions:
The pinnacle racing event in the Funkeys Racing League, winning the Grand Prix is the ultimate goal of every driver! Can Speed Racer defeat the rampant corruption throughout the FRL, and restore the purity to the sport?

Driving the Mach 6: Use the arrow keys to control the car. Press the up arrow to accelerate, the down arrow to brake/reverse and left/right arrow to steer.

Press the space bar to activate your jump jacks to get out of any hairy situations!

Tips: Pay attention to the different alerts during the race. The "warning sign" indicates a combination of difficult curves ahead. Reduce your speed before the curves to avoid skidding and stay on the track in order to keep your speed!

Go Speed, go!

games.name: Speed Racer's Pinball*
games.Instructions:
When not racing around the track, Speed Racer likes to unwind by playing other fast paced games where precision timing is key! His favorite is Pinball! Lets see how many points you can win!

To launch the ball, press the down arrow key and release when the plunger is fully depressed. Use the left arrow key to control the left flipper and the right arrow key to control the right flipper. If you're in danger of losing a ball, Hit the space bar to nudge the machine and bounce your ball back into play! Watch out though! Nudging the machine too many times will cause the machine to tilt and your game to be over!

Make the skill shot by highlighting all 200s to give you 5x score bonus on the top three bumpers. Hit all the S-P-E-E-D bumpers to activate 2x score bonus and hit all the R-A-C-E-R bumpers to activate 4x score bonus!

Sometimes Speed Racer will get goals in the box in the lower right. Achieve those goals for cool bonuses.

games.name: Taejo's Casa Christo 5000
games.Instructions:
The longest race in the Funkeys Racing League circuit, the Casa Christo 5000 is a true test of endurance... and bravery! Can Taejo defend the honor of Togokahn Motors by defeating all other racers?

Controlling Taejo's Car: Use the arrow keys to control the car. Press the up arrow to Accelerate, the down arrow to brake/reverse and left/right arrow to steer.

Press the space bar to activate your jump jacks to get out of any hairy situations!

Tips: Pay attention to the different alerts during the race. The "Warning Sign" indicates a combination of difficult curves ahead. Reduce your speed before the curves to avoid skidding. Driving outside the track makes driving more difficult.

games.name: Trixie's Helicopter Rescue
games.Instructions:
A mysterious storm is raging in Funkeystown, but Trixie is always ready to aid a Funkey in times of crisis! Can you pilot Trixie's helicopter and rescue the Funkeys in danger?

Use the arrow keys to fly Trixie's helicopter in any direction. The Space key lowers the rescue basket to pick up and drop off Funkeys. Position the rescue basket where a Funkey can hop in to let them get aboard - up to 2 Funkeys can be rescued at a time! Pilot the rescued Funkey(s) to Grand Funkeys Station and drop them off safely. If your basket is down, you'll fly slower, so make sure to lift it up to help get your passengers to safety quickly.

Rescue all the Funkeys in peril to advance to the next level. Watch out for the lightning though as it will damage your helicopter! If you run into a lightning bolt, your Funkey passengers may be shocked out of the basket. If those pesky stormclouds are getting too close, blast them with sunshine using "Z"! Trixie to the Rescue!

games.name: Angus Ammo Dump
games.Instructions: You've unlocked Angus' secret ammo dump. Here you'll find bottle rockets, skyrockets, Roman candles, flares and many more. Just click on each of the different fireworks to light them up. See how many you can set off!

games.name: Angus' Vault
games.Instructions:
Ever wonder where all the coins go after the Henchman takes them? Its stored into a vault in the Villain's Den. Angus has created a special portal that opens once a day to allow you limited access into the vault.

Hurry and collect as many gold coins as you can while avoiding the black ones. The black ones will make some of your coins disappear from your wallet!

Be quick! You only have a limited time before one of the Henchman guards come to check on the room.

games.name: Domino Chain Reaction
games.Instructions: Set 'em up, then knock 'em down! Choose any of the 6 possible domino pieces and place it on the board. Each piece represents a series of dominoes laid out in a specific pattern. Straight line, right/left curves, a split and a bridge. The Split allows you to branch your dominoes in opposite directions. The bridge allows you to go over pieces you've already placed. The arrow allows you to switch the direction of a domino. Click X if you make a mistake. Click the play button to watch your masterpiece fall!

games.name: Funk-Jongg
games.Instructions: A favorite pastime of all Funkeys, Funk Jongg is a deceptively simple matching game. Click on any two matching tiles to remove them. Only tiles that are free can be selected. Free tiles are not covered by any other tile and they do not have they do not have another tile on either the left or the right side of them. Clear as many as you can before the time is up!

games.name: Jade Jumble
games.Instructions:
While the Oni Dojo was built so that the Oni could keep their fighting skills sharp, the game of Jade Jumble was designed to keep their minds sharp!

Clear a path for the jade warrior so that it can move off the field of battle on the opposite side of the board. To move stones, click and hold the left mouse button over the piece you wish to move and drag it across the game board. Solve each puzzle before the time runs out. Bonus points will be awarded based on the amount of time remaining on the clock. Good luck warriors!

games.name: More Buttons?
games.Instructions:
Found throughout Terrapinia are mysterious buttons. Each Funkeys has their own theory on what happens when a button is pushed. The Boggle believe if you push one, delicious food will come to you later that day. The Snipe believe pushing the buttons daily improved their muscles and motor skills. The Ptep believe pushing the button delivers treasures for King Funkankhamun where he may be.

What will the buttons for you? Push one and wait, you never know what these mysterious buttons might do.

games.name: Museum Mask Mayhem
games.Instructions: A classic game played by all Funkeys in school, Mask Mayhem was developed to teach young Funkeys history lessons on ancient Funkey civilizations. Click on any two or more groupings of the same kind of masks to clear them and get points. Be quick though because the game ends when the masks fill the screen!

games.name: Plink Plonk Funk
games.Instructions:
The symbolism that the elements of this game represents, and how they relate to the story of the Oni is so deep, and shrouded in mystery that only King Sidd himself knows what they mean. Regardless, it's a ton of fun, and that's all that really matters...right?

You must hit all the black pegs before running out of balls to complete a level. Move the mouse left and right to aim the fish. Press the left mouse button to shoot. Keep your eyes out for bonuses that will give you back your ball! Different colored balls will behave differently. Try to figure them out!

games.name: Polygonix
games.Instructions:
Angus loves putting experimenting with how things fit together...can you figure out his Polygonix?

Use the various shapes provided to fill in the design on the game board. Click once on a shape to pick it up. Click the mouse button again to place it back on the game board. While selected, press the space bar to rotate the shape.

Try to solve each puzzle before the time runds out. A time bonus will be awarded based on the amount of time remaining once the puzzle is complete. Good luck!

games.name: Smashing Good Time
games.Instructions: Being attacked by villains just make a Funkey so mad, they might want to break things. Knowing this, Angus created a special room for Funkeys to do just that. Just take a whack at whatever you find, and you may find yourself rewarded for it! Have a smashing good time!

games.name: Spin and Win!
games.Instructions: Spin once a day! Click the center of the wheel to start the spin. When the wheel stops you win the prize shown! Is today your lucky day?

games.name: Sushi Showdown
games.Instructions:
Leave it to the Oni to even create a competition around eating dinner! Sure you get to taste the yummy Sushi, but only if you beat your opponent to the other side of the board

Each player starts with their sushi on one corner of the star and attempts to move them all to the opposite corner. Take turns moving one piece of Sushi either a single step, or a chain of one or more hops. A step consists of moving a piece of Sushi to an adjacent unoccupied space in any of the six directions. A hop consists of jumping over a single adjacent piece of Sushi (either one's own or an opponent's) to an unoccupied space directly opposite. The objective of the game is to place all of your sushi pieces in the corner opposite your starting position before your opponent!

games.name: Whack A Villain
games.Instructions: Angered by the all of the trouble villains have been giving the Funkeys, Angus developed a game to take out his frustrations on! Just whack away at any villain that pops up! Take that Master Lox!
